name: Immersive Content Ad-Interrupt Fatigue
description: Viewers are complaining about the volume and placement of ads, specifically mentioning ads appearing 'after every entrance' in long-form content. This disrupts the emotional momentum of high-stakes entertainment.
pain_points: Ad fatigue during peak engagement moments
Loss of emotional immersion due to mid-roll frequency
Intentional avoidance of platforms through ad-blockers
tech_stack: NVIDIA CUDA / TensorRT for edge Inference
